articles.title: UCLA honors its history while making more of it with NCAA championship: 'We had a feeling this was our time'
articles.description: Now UCLA's storied sports history includes the 2026 women's team, which won in dominant fashion on Sunday to secure its first NCAA championship.

articles.title: Boisvert’s First NHL Goal Lifts Blackhawks To 4-2 Win Over Kraken
articles.description: The Chicago Blackhawks snapped a five-game losing streak and earned their first win at Climate Pledge Arena since 2021, defeating […] The post Boisvert’s First NHL Goal Lifts Blackhawks To 4-2 Win Over Kraken appeared first on Chicago Hockey Now.

articles.title: Tories pledge to scrap carbon taxes on industry
articles.description: Kemi Badenoch says carbon taxes have made doing business in Britain "much, much harder than it needs to be".

articles.title: 'My six-year-old has nosebleeds': Chiang Mai air pollution sparks health fears
articles.description: Chiang Mai now ranks among the world's most polluted cities as fires engulf the surrounding countryside.
